narrative:
Saltcreek-North/Tarlton (precinct in Pickaway County) has 872 registered voters, with 52.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
